notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom reaches on a throwing error by shortstop J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Darell Hernaiz out at 2nd. Nick Kurtz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Nick Kurtz.
